case_title: SF HOUSING AUTHORITY vs. MARSH, JR., JAMES et al

docket_entries.description: SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CONTINUED TO AUG-03-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 PER DEPARTMENT AT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
JURY TRIAL CONTINUED TO AUG-10-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 PER DEPARTMENT AT TRIAL

CAUSE CALLED FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. PL. PRESENT WITH ALLYCE KIMERLING AS COUNSEL. DEF. PRESENT & IN PRO PER. SETTLED BY STIPULATION W/JUDGMENT FOR PL - RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 789 HAYES, APT. C, FORFEITURE OF LEASE, $1,079 RENT & DAMAGES - WRIT TO ISSUE & POST IMMEDIATELY, BUT EVICTION STAYED TO 9-7-93 12NOON - DEF. WARRANTS HE IS THE ONLY ADULT OCCUPANT - NO FURTHER STAYS WILL BE GRANTED. PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARSH, JR., JAMES THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 789 HAYES STREET. APT. C, S.F. $1,079.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,079.00, STAYED UNTIL SEP-07-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, STAYED TILL 12:00 NOON SEPT 7, 1993. NO FURTHER STAYS.SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
